chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-3591 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For hearing of main case 06.09.2023 Mr. Kamaluddin advocate for respondent No.7. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. ----- Petitioner and his counsel are called absent and so also on the last date. Petitioner is a society allegedly registered for the protection of fundamental rights. In this petition they have claimed from respondents No.1, 2, 3 and 5 extra funds for constructing some of the campuses / classes of Mirpurkhas Medical College. Although the petitioner could hardly be framed as a person aggrieved of such as claimed in the petition, however, since they have not been represented for the last two dates petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
